---
title: "Continuous Grip-Force Dynamics as an Online Biophysical Signal of Perceptual Strain"
author: "Mohammad Dastgheib"
date: "2026-06-24"
bibliography: references.bib
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: true
  pdf:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
---

{{< include _manuscript-content.qmd >}}
